MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.title: Fairy Heart
MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.description:
At the start of your turn, lose all Majoka.
Whenever you take damage, reduce it by your current Strength (cannot reduce that hit below 0).
MANOSABA-FAIRY_HEART.flavor: I've become the perfect detective Sherry! I'll never be Majoka again.
